name: Forest 6174
short_description: A brief narrative-driven psychological horror experience in first person (no jumpscares, story and dialogue-focused). You play as Danny, who is unexpectedly summoned to receive a break from his daily routine... However, things start to look out of place once you get deeper into the forest.
detailed_description:
Forest 6174

A BRIEF FIRST-PERSON PSYCHOLOGICAL HORROR EXPERIENCE

Story

You are Danny, an exceptional individual. Danny is cooperative. Danny follows the rules. No matter how bad he feels, Danny is always ready to smile.

But one day, Danny is summoned. Not for a promotion. Not for a reprimand. Just to be given a break, some time out of his routine.

Now, Danny is lost in the darkness of the forest, a place where logic crumbles and events defy reality. To find a way out, he must unravel the secret that lies deep within.

Gameplay

Forest 6174 offers an immersive first-person experience that combines psychological and atmospheric horror. The narrative unfolds through subtle interactions with the environment. Explore an eerie location and uncover fragments of the story as you progress.

Time

20 - 25 minutes of gameplay.

Key Features

  • Atmospheric environment: Each level and the accompanying sounds are part of an immersive experience.

  • Psychological horror: The game presents situations in which you do not know if they are real or in your head.

  • If you pay attention you will discover some interesting details.

The game has a unique ending.

supported_languages: English, German, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Russian
